# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

- 200
          request_method:
            - GET
          content_type:
            - application/json
          cache_ttl: 300
          strategy: memory
          memory:
            dictionary_name: kong_db_cache

      - name: request-size-limiting
        config:
          allowed_payload_size: 10
          size_unit: megabytes

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Notification Service
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: notification-service
    url: http://notification-service-upstream
    protocol: http
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: notification-routes
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - notifications
          - protected

      - name: webhook-routes
        paths:
          - /api/v1/webhooks
        methods:
          - POST
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        tags:
          - notifications
          - webhooks

    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50
          hour: 1000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          redis_timeout: 2000
          fault_tolerant: true

  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  # Health Check Endpoint (Internal)
  # ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  - name: gateway-health
    url: http://127.0.0.1:8001/status
    routes:
      - name: health-check
        paths:
          - /health
        methods:
          - GET
        strip_path: true
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        tags:
          - health
          - internal

# =============================================================================
# Consumers (API Clients)
# =============================================================================

consumers:
  - username: web-app-client
    custom_id: web-app-001
    tags:
      - web
      - frontend
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-app-api-key-change-me-in-production
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 15000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0

  - username: mobile-app-client
    custom_id: mobile-app-001
    tags:
      - mobile
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: mobile-app-api-key-change-me-in-production
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 10000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0

  - username: third-party-partner
    custom_id: partner-001
    tags:
      - partner
      - external
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: partner-api-key-change-me-in-production
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 100
          hour: 3000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0

  - username: internal-service
    custom_id: internal-svc-001
    tags:
      - internal
      - service
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: internal-service-api-key-change-me-in-production
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 2000
          hour: 50000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0

# =============================================================================
# Global Plugins (Applied to all services/routes)
# =============================================================================

plugins:
  # JWT Authentication (global - applied to protected routes)
  - name: jwt
    config:
      uri_param_names:
        - jwt
      cookie_names: []
      key_claim_name: iss
      secret_is_base64: false
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
      run_on_preflight: true
      maximum_expiration: 3600
    route: user-routes
    enabled: true

  - name: jwt
    config:
      uri_param_names:
        - jwt
      key_claim_name: iss
      secret_is_base64: false
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
      maximum_expiration: 3600
    route: user-profile-routes
    enabled: true

  - name: jwt
    config:
      uri_param_names:
        - jwt
      key_claim_name: iss
      secret_is_base64: false
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
      maximum_expiration: 3600
    route: order-routes
    enabled: true

  - name: jwt
    config:
      uri_param_names:
        - jwt
      key_claim_name: iss
      secret_is_base64: false
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
      maximum_expiration: 3600
    route: order-checkout
    enabled: true

  - name: jwt
    config:
      uri_param_names:
        - jwt
      key_claim_name: iss
      secret_is_base64: false
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
      maximum_expiration: 3600
    route: notification-routes
    enabled: true

  # API Key Authentication for service-to-service communication
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - X-API-Key
        - apikey
      key_in_query: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: true
    route: webhook-routes
    enabled: true

  # Global CORS Plugin
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://www.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
        - HEAD
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Version
        - Authorization
        - Content-Length
        - Content-MD5
        - Content-Type
        - Date
        - X-Auth-Token
        - X-API-Key
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-Correlation-ID
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Auth-Token
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
        - X-Kong-Upstream-Latency
        - X-Kong-Proxy-Latency
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false
    enabled: true

  # Global Request Transformer - Add correlation headers
  - name: correlation-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Correlation-ID
      generator: uuid#counter
      echo_downstream: true
    enabled: true

  # Global Response Transformer - Security headers
  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff"
          - "X-Frame-Options: DENY"
          - "X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block"
          - "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload"
          - "Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
          - "Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'"
          - "Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()"
      remove:
        headers:
          - Server
          - X-Powered-By
          - Via
    enabled: true

  # Global IP Restriction (block known bad actors)
  - name: ip-restriction
    config:
      deny:
        - 192.168.1.100
      status: 403
      message: "Your IP address is not allowed"
    enabled: false
    tags:
      - security

  # Bot Detection
  - name: bot-detection
    config:
      deny:
        - "Scrapy"
        - "curl"
      allow: []
    enabled: false
    tags:
      - security

  # Global logging - HTTP Log
  - name: http-log
    config:
      http_endpoint: http://log-collector:9200/kong-logs/_doc
      method: POST
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      flush_timeout: 2
      retry_count: 5
      queue_size: 1000
      content_type: application/json
      custom_fields_by_lua: {}
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - logging

  # File logging for local debugging
  - name: file-log
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/access.log
      reopen: true
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - logging

  # TCP logging to centralized logging system
  - name: tcp-log
    config:
      host: logstash
      port: 5514
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      tls: false
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - logging

  # Prometheus metrics for monitoring
  - name: prometheus
    config:
      per_consumer: true
      status_code_metrics: true
      latency_metrics: true
      bandwidth_metrics: true
      upstream_health_metrics: true
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - monitoring

  # Zipkin distributed tracing
  - name: zipkin
    config:
      http_endpoint: http://zipkin:9411/api/v2/spans
      sample_ratio: 0.1
      include_credential: true
      traceid_byte_count: 16
      header_type: preserve
      default_header_type: b3-single
      tags_header: Zipkin-Tags
      static_tags:
        - name: environment
          value: production
        - name: gateway
          value: kong
    enabled: true
    tags:
      - tracing

  # Request Termination for maintenance mode (disabled by default)
  - name: request-termination
    config:
      status_code: 503
      message: "Service is temporarily unavailable for maintenance. Please try again later."
      content_type: "application/json"
      body: '{"error": true, "code": 503, "message": "Service is temporarily unavailable for maintenance. Please try again later."}'
    enabled: false
    tags:
      - maintenance

  # ACL Plugin for role-based route access
  - name: acl
    route: user-routes
    config:
      allow:
        - admin
        - user-manager
      deny: []
      hide_groups_header: true
    enabled: false
    tags:
      - authorization
